'''Michael Unther''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], a veteran of twenty years of front-line service who became a respected [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Academy]] instructor after his retirement from active duty.

==Biography==
Born to privileged parents, Unther was enrolled in a military career in order to curb his rebellious streak. After the Academy, he used family connections to get himself assigned to a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]], but after distinguishing himself for bravery, he was promoted to command the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Victory (Imperial-class)|''Victory'']].<ref name="WC" />

When his father was accused of [[Treason/Legends|treason]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Unther's reputation as a loyal hero of the Empire protected him from the scandal, and he rose to be an [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]], subsequently promoted to [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]] on stepping down from active service.<ref name="WC" />

By the time of his retirement, Admiral Unther was considered one of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] leading [[Planetary assault tactics]] experts, and he subsequently became a noted Academy instructor, touring training facilities across the Empire, of which the [[Duluur sector/Legends|Duluur sector]] [[Duluur Sector Naval Academy|Academy]] was typical.<ref name="WC" />

==Personality and traits==
Unther looked and acted like a copybook Imperial commander—big, balding, and heavy-jowled, a staunch and steadfast supporter of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]; few guessed that he had harbored profound private reservations about the regime ever since his father's disappearance.<ref name="WC" />
